posts.title: One phone link for every window — now behind a code
posts.summary: Running several Copilot agents across windows and machines turns your phone into a wallet of QR codes. The CloakCode gateway multiplexes every window into one phone link — and the moment it's exposed beyond loopback, operator TOTP locks it down automatically.

posts.title: Your Copilot agent is waiting for you — and you're not at your desk
posts.summary: Copilot stalls waiting on one approval while you're away — CloakCode mirrors your live session to your phone so you can unblock it with a tap, without your code ever leaving your machine.

posts.title: Hello, World
posts.summary: Why I built this site and how it works.
